title: Arenes
summary: 9701 A Level arene chemistry — electrophilic substitution, directing groups, and mechanisms.
learningObjectives: Explain nitration, halogenation, and Friedel–Crafts reactions.

simpleExplanation.title: Substitution not addition
simpleExplanation.summary: Benzene resists addition — electrophilic substitution preserves aromaticity. Substituents direct the next group ortho/para or meta.
steps: Generate E+ — NO₂⁺, Br⁺, R⁺, RCO⁺.
Arenium ion intermediate — temporary loss of aromaticity.

sections.content: **Arenes** (30.1) extend **29.3** with **directing rules**. Draw full **curly arrow mechanisms** for nitration.
